result.title: Canva's AI Features Got A MAJOR Upgrade
result.description:
Canva just announced AI 2.0, and it’s about to change how we design forever. 

Imagine prompting an entire social media campaign into existence just by linking a Notion brief. No more starting from scratch.

Here’s what’s coming soon:
🧠 Style Learning: It learns your unique brand/YouTube style and adapts to it.
🔨 Tool Integration: Connects directly with Slack, Notion, and Gmail.
🗓️ Task Automation: Schedule it to write documents or generate summary reports automatically.
🌃 Infinite Elements: Generate 3D, audio, and graphics right inside the editor.
🛜 Offline Mode: Finally, design without needing a Wi-Fi connection.

Which feature are you most excited for? Let me know! 👇

#Canva #AI #GraphicDesign #ContentCreator #AInews
